untranslatable_reason: Broadening Top pattern recognition requires multi-bar structural analysis (identifying expanding highs and lows across a series of candles). This cannot be expressed as a single 3-field condition using only the allowed point-in-time indicators. The pattern requires: (1) detection of at least 2 swing highs with increasing peaks, (2) detection of at least 2 swing lows with decreasing troughs, and (3) confirmation of breakout direction. No structural pattern recognition indicator is available in the allowed list.
translation_notes: Signal references a specific charting pattern (Broadening Top) that requires visual/structural pattern detection. Entry condition 'buy before the breakout' is approximated with price crossing above SMA_20 as a proxy for bullish momentum, but this does not capture the true broadening top formation. Stop loss of 6% and target of 35% are encoded from the parameters. Manual pattern detection or a dedicated pattern recognition library would be required for accurate implementation.
